product_highlights: GHK-Cu Liposome Copper Tri-Peptide-1 Liquid 10% with 7x cell absorption
Advanced liposomal delivery system for enhanced peptide bioavailability

B2B wholesale pricing for cosmetic manufacturers
notes: Bulk Naturals is a US-based wholesale ingredient supplier specializing in liposomal delivery systems for cosmetic actives. Their flagship carrier peptide product, GHK-Cu Liposome Copper Tri-Peptide-1 Liquid 10%, features a proprietary liposomal delivery system that achieves 7x enhanced cell absorption compared to standard formulations. The product provides UV protection, anti-inflammatory benefits, and free radical reduction, making it ideal for premium anti-aging skincare formulations.
